title: WIP: BESE tokenizer — 38-token structured alphabet + BPE, 288 vocab, 12.9MB model
author: mrbese

data.description: Tokenizer redesign reduces vocabulary size and reallocates saved embedding parameters toward deeper Transformer models.
Two-layer BESE tokenizer with a 38-token structured alphabet followed by BPE on the structured token stream.
Fast BPE trainer with O(N log N) complexity and a full training pipeline for shard export and GPT training.

novel_contributions: BESE two-layer tokenizer with a linguistically structured 38-token alphabet
BPE trained on structured tokens rather than raw bytes
Embedding-parameter savings used to fund extra Transformer layers
Fast O(N log N) BPE trainer
Byte-accurate tokenizer with verified BPB accounting
